text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's getting late, so maybe I'll just go ahead and
buy lunch at the school store today... hm?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Those two were literally just fighting and now they're outside eating sandwiches together?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I... I have to get close for a better look!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only has Agnes Digital failed to spy on
Umamusume, she's also missed her chance to eat
lunch.
